headline: Moderna (MRNA) Is Down 10.6% After Q1 Loss Widened On Settlement And EU Vaccine Wins – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Moderna reported revenue of US$389 million versus US$108 million a year earlier, while net loss widened to US$1.34 billion, largely reflecting a US$950 million litigation settlement, and the company also secured European approvals for several vaccines including mCOMBRIAX, the first flu and COVID-19 combination shot. Beyond the headline loss, the quarter highlighted Moderna’s growing reliance on international government partnerships, especially the U.K. deal, and...
